name: Sidebar links open Feynman and Settings pages
description: After login, clicking Feynman Mode and Settings in the sidebar navigates to pages that render their content without a 404 or blank screen.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and navigate to the dashboard
Click the Feynman Mode link in the Study section of the sidebar
Verify the Feynman Mode page loaded — it shows a topic selector or heading, NOT a 404 or blank page
Click the Settings link in the sidebar
Verify the Settings page loaded — it shows a settings form or tabs, NOT a 404 or blank page
